attempts.summary: Ran sec_analytics dns-tunnel detector against dns index for 2026-04-13 to 2026-04-20; it flagged 10.0.2.45 for ~1,500 unique subdomains under data-corp.io with high TXT ratio.

answer.evidence: From Apr 13–19, 2026, 10.0.2.45 made ~1,500 queries to data-corp.io with ~1,500 unique subdomains and 73% TXT responses—consistent with DNS tunneling.
